sub_sims.s_expr:
(sub-sim
          (begin
            (define candidates (filter (lambda (r) (> (nth r 1) 10)) my-relationships))
            (define best (if (empty? candidates) my-id (nth (car candidates) 0)))

diary_entries.entry: Another year. Small meteorite impacts near colony. The colony feels hopeful. My paranoia grows stronger.
Population: 26. Small meteorite impacts near colony. I spent the year on mediation. Closest to Iris-45.
Another year. Small meteorite impacts near colony. The colony feels hopeful. My resolve grows stronger.

meta_awareness: Iris (year 98): 'I ran a sub-sim today and watched the tiny colonists deliberate. They seemed so real. Are we equally small to someone watching us?'
